archetype_description: Elite Athleticism & Precision, command-center focus. High visibility 'Tactical' look for industrial environments and time-tracking.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold uppercase

layout_rules: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID. Dense, data correlation, scanability.
Every pixel utilized, use h-full on children.
Optical alignment: left-align dense industrial data (Cliente, Lavoro, Data).
Cards have flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default.

card.base: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-sm transition-all duration-200

button.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold rounded-sm px-5 py-2 hover:bg-[#3395FF] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF]/50
button.danger: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold rounded-sm px-5 py-2 hover:bg-[#FF453A] transition-colors
button.success: bg-[#32D74B] text-black font-bold rounded-sm px-5 py-2 hover:bg-[#30D158] transition-colors
button.outline: border border-white/20 text-white font-bold rounded-sm px-5 py-2 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

input.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 text-white rounded-sm px-3 py-2.5 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] focus:border-[#007AFF] transition-all placeholder:text-white/30

table.header: text-xs tracking-[0.1em] uppercase font-bold text-white/50 border-b border-white/10 pb-3

timer_active.container: border border-[#32D74B]/50 bg-[#32D74B]/10 rounded-sm p-3 flex items-center justify-between

timer_idle.container: border border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] rounded-sm p-3 flex items-center justify-between

visual_enhancers.borders: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Use border-collapse for main metrics. 1px solid stroke for tactical minimalism. No glowing borders.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Lighter hue of active state. Text color explicitly set on hover.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, technical industrial feel.

image_urls.description: Industrial printing factory setting for the login page background, overlay with bg-black/70 to ensure form contrast.
Operator avatar placeholder in the dashboard header or user profile sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Shadcn components (cards, tables, inputs, dialogs) but customize them to match the dark 'Tactical Minimalism' look by using `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`, dark backgrounds (`bg-[#141414]` for surface, `bg-[#0A0A0A]` for app background), and strict 1px borders (`border-white/10`).
For the Timer feature, use a monospace font (e.g. `font-mono`) to prevent layout shifting during the countdown, and utilize the `timer_active` and `timer_idle` styles provided above.
The core form for 'SCHEDA LAV. CONFEZIONE' must handle: Cliente, Lavoro, Data, Operatore, Numero Ordine.

Operations (Taglio, Rilegatura, Incollaggio, Fustellatura, Plastificazione, Impacchettamento) should be rendered as an interactive list or grid where operators can input quantities (N. fogli, N. parti, N. colli) and manage time (estimated vs. actual).
Include a 'Start' / 'Stop' button for each operation. When running, the operation card should pulse lightly or have a green border to indicate active tracking.
Reports and Statistics dashboard should use charts (Recharts or Shadcn Charts) with high-contrast colors (Volt Blue and Pure White) to compare estimated vs actual time.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='start-timer-taglio'`).
Do not use glassmorphism for this industrial app; use flat, solid dark backgrounds with crisp borders to maximize data legibility.
